---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a gameplay feature, system, tool, UI improvement, or technical enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
-------------

# 🎮 Feature Request

## Summary

A short description of the feature, mechanic, system, or improvement.

---

## Feature Type

* [ ] Gameplay mechanic
* [ ] Combat system
* [ ] AI / NPC behavior
* [ ] UI / UX
* [ ] Audio / Music
* [ ] Visual effect / VFX
* [ ] Animation
* [ ] Optimization / Performance
* [ ] Save / Load system
* [ ] Dialogue / Narrative
* [ ] Level design
* [ ] Tooling / Editor extension
* [ ] Multiplayer / Networking
* [ ] Accessibility
* [ ] Bugfix improvement
* [ ] Other:

---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve?
What experience should improve for the player or development team?

Examples:

* Reduce repetitive workflow for designers
* Improve combat feel
* Make UI easier to navigate
* Optimize frame rate in large scenes
* Add missing gameplay depth

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the feature should work.

Include details such as:

### Gameplay

* Core mechanic
* Player interaction
* Rules or limitations
* Win/fail conditions

### Technical

* Unity systems involved
* Required packages or dependencies
* Scene or prefab impact
* ScriptableObjects, Addressables, ECS, etc.

### Visual / Audio

* Required animations
* UI feedback
* Sound effects or music
* VFX requirements

### Editor / Workflow

* Inspector tools
* Custom editor windows
* Automation or pipeline improvements

---

## Acceptance Criteria

Define what must be completed for this feature to be considered done.

Example:

* [ ] Player can interact with object
* [ ] Save system persists data correctly
* [ ] UI works on 16:9 and ultrawide
* [ ] Feature has no console errors
* [ ] Performance impact tested

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe other approaches or solutions you considered.

---

## Risks / Concerns

Potential technical risks, balancing concerns, or production challenges.

Examples:

* Performance overhead
* Difficult animation setup
* Network synchronization complexity
* Save compatibility issues

---

## Additional Context

Add references, mockups, screenshots, videos, design documents, or inspiration.

Optional:

* Related issues
* Prototype clips
* External references
* Design notes
